titleStmt.title: SII 34.84: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 84. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 50th year = A.D. 1120.

This records a gift of 4 mā of land by the mahāsabhā of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Viṟai-kūṟṟam in Ulaguyyavandachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank for worship to the temple of Tiruvagattīśvaram-uḍaiya-Mahādēva at Vaḷavaṉ-Puḷiyaṅguḍi in the same nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOvirāja kEcari panmarāna tripuvanacakravattikaḷ śrī kulOttuṅka cOḻa devaṟku yā
ṇṭu 5 10 Āvatu vaṭakarai Ulakuyavanta cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaik kūṟṟattu brahmatēyam śrīkāmaravalliccaruppē
ti maṅkalattupperuṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyōm Innāṭṭu vaḷavaṉ puḷiyaṅkuṭit tiruvakattīśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar
kōyil tirukkāvaṇattē kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟakkuṭi Iruntu Ittēvaṟku Accanāpōkattāl Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nilam
namūr śrīkōtaṇṭarāma peruvāykāṟ kīḻttirunārāyaṇa vatikku mēṟku Avaṉi gendharuva vāykkālukkut teṟku mu
ttu nila miraṇṭumāva
teṟku mūṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutalt tuṇṭattut tekkāka vittēva nilamiraṇṭumāvumāka nilanālumā viṉṉila nālumā
vuc cantrādhitdhavat kācukoṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka vittiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟku viṭṭō miṭṭamaikku sa
bhaiyuḷiruntu paṇittār kāmaravalliccEri veṭṭip poṉmalai paṭṭa traiyājiyār paṇiyālum cOḻamātEviccEri
vāṇamaṅkalattu nāraciṅka mātavapaṭṭar paṇiyālum Avaṉi gendharvvaccērip pākaḷūr śrīraṅkanātapaṭṭan paṇiyālum rā
jakēcariccēri tānīśvarattu Ātivarāka nāraṇapaṭṭa paṇiyālumppaṇippaṇiyāl paṇittu kācu koḷā Iṟaiyiliyāy vi
ṭṭamaikku paṇiyālivūr mattyahastan cūlamaṅkalamuṭaiyān=tirumāliruñcōlai vaṭakōpuramuṭaiyān Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
